name: ScummVM

bios.notes: Game data files are required; ScummVM game IDs and detection databases drive launch behavior.

library_behavior.playlist_target_preference: ScummVM game folder or launcher descriptor

frontend_notes.emudeck: Steam ROM Manager and ES-DE may require ScummVM games to be imported into ScummVM first or represented by launcher files.
frontend_notes.pegasus: Pegasus launch commands need the ScummVM target ID, not just a folder path.

notes: Do not rename internal game data files to match frontend display names; ScummVM detection can depend on original files.
